product_description: A lightweight SaaS platform that helps small teams capture, qualify, and follow up on inbound leads without a full CRM rollout.
target_customer_guess: Urban Nepal service businesses, agencies, and startups that need better lead tracking before they hire dedicated sales operations staff.
pricing_model: Monthly subscription with a free trial and team-based paid tiers.
research_goal: Validate which buyer segments and digital channels in Nepal should be prioritized for an initial demand-generation motion.
